hero.headline: Conquer Your Day, One Task at a Time
hero.subheadline: Taskr transforms chaos into clarity, helping high-performers stay focused, organized, and ahead of their goals.
hero.hero_image_prompt: Professional workspace with a minimalist desk, laptop showing a clean task management interface. A person in business casual attire is organizing digital tasks using drag-and-drop, with holographic task cards floating around. Soft blue and slate gray color palette, clean modern lighting.

features.title: Intelligent Task Management
features.description: Automatically prioritize tasks, set smart reminders, and track your productivity with AI-powered insights.

features.title: Seamless Collaboration
features.description: Share projects, assign tasks, and sync in real-time with teammates across any device.

features.title: Customizable Workflows
features.description: Adapt Taskr to your unique work style with flexible boards, tags, and custom views.

empty_state.headline: Your productivity journey starts here
empty_state.subtext: Add your first task and transform potential into progress.

drag_and_drop_instructions.headline: Organize with Ease
drag_and_drop_instructions.description: Drag and drop tasks to reorder, prioritize, or move between lists. Your workflow, your way.

cta_section.headline: Ready to Unlock Your Productivity Potential?
cta_section.subheadline: Join thousands of professionals who've transformed their work with Taskr.
